name: Proton Pass (SimpleLogin API)
description: Password manager + SimpleLogin alias API (end-to-end encrypted).

seo.title: Proton Pass (SimpleLogin API) — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Proton Pass (SimpleLogin API): Password manager + SimpleLogin alias API (end-to-end encrypted).

when_to_use: End-to-end encrypted password storage via Proton Pass
SimpleLogin email alias API for developer privacy tools
Team password sharing with zero-knowledge encryption model
Privacy-first credential management for security-conscious teams
Alias-based email authentication for account isolation

cons: Changes to free-tier limits over time
review.verdict: Solid privacy-first password manager; the developer API is narrow but useful for alias automation.
review.best_for: Privacy-focused individuals and small teams already in Proton's ecosystem.
review.not_for: Enterprises needing deep SCIM/SSO and broad programmatic access.
